response.justification: Candidate is a Staff/Senior engineer with 15+ years of experience applying for a junior/mid-level entry-level role. While the technical skills (TypeScript, React, Node.js, PostgreSQL/SQL, AWS) strongly match and exceed requirements, the seniority mismatch is severe. Overqualified candidates at this level typically present retention risk, salary expectation conflicts, and team dynamic issues. Additionally, the role requires high on-site presence and the candidate is based in Bucharest with only basic German, which is a significant logistical concern for a renovation/energy consulting platform likely serving German-speaking customers.
strengths: Strong TypeScript/Node.js and React experience across multiple companies
Fullstack breadth from embedded to web, plus AWS CDK and Kubernetes exposure
Demonstrated software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, clean architecture interest
concerns: Severely overqualified — 15+ years experience for an entry-level junior/mid role
Location mismatch (Bucharest) versus high on-site presence requirement
Only basic German for a German renovation/energy consulting platform
